title: iosanthus toxicarius
intro: Iosanthus toxicarius, also known as the poison arrow tree, is a species of plant that belongs to the family Rutaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include the presence of toxic compounds that can help to repel insects and kill bacteria. The health benefits of Iosanthus toxicarius are said to include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. In herbal preparations, Iosanthus toxicarius is often used as an ingredient in traditional remedies, but it should be handled with caution due to its toxic nature and potential for causing allergic reactions.
